[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0011000 2
2 0000000 a
3 0110100 3
4 0001001 2
5 0000000 a
6 0101100 3
7 0000000 a

01 10 0001000 1
12 21 0000000 a match 0 2 5 7
23 32 0100100 2
34 43 0000000 a match 0 2 5 7
45 54 0000000 a match 0 2 5 7
56 65 0100000 1
67 76 0000000 a match 0 2 5 7
70 07 0011000 2 match 1

02 20 0110100 3 match 3
13 31 0001001 2 match 4
24 42 0000000 a match 0 2 5 7
35 53 0101100 3 match 6
46 64 0000000 a match 0 2 5 7
57 75 0011000 2 match 1
60 06 0100000 1
71 17 1001000 2

03 30 0101100 3 match 6
14 41 0000000 a match 0 2 5 7
25 52 0110100 3 match 3
36 63 0100000 1
47 74 0000000 a match 0 2 5 7
50 05 0111100 4
61 16 0000000 a match 0 2 5 7
72 27 0010000 1

04 40 0000000 a match 0 2 5 7
15 51 0001010 2
26 62 0100000 1
37 73 0001000 1
